matched.gsapRationaleText: timeline on .sd-rationale-text: headline y30/0.8s power3.out, desc y20/0.6s @-=0.4, cta y16/0.5s @-=0.3
matched.gsapImageClip: 0.9s power3.inOut inset reveal on image wrappers @ top 88%
matched.gsapBenefits: per-item border scaleX 0.4s, icon back.out @-=0.15, text x:-12 @-=0.25
matched.preScrollStates: headline opacity 0 / y 30px; image clip-path inset bottom 100%

fixedDuringPass.sectionOrder: Pillar hub had rationale/outcomes before offerings — reordered to match McShannock
fixedDuringPass.animationTimelines: Rationale hook rewrote from staggered onEnter to proper GSAP timeline overlaps with autoAlpha
fixedDuringPass.outcomesAnimation: Benefits now use gsap.from with autoAlpha; text column uses timeline not onEnter callbacks
fixedDuringPass.cssOpacityOverride: Removed opacity:1!important on rationale/outcomes content that blocked autoAlpha fades
fixedDuringPass.rationaleImageClasses: Removed lg:min-h-[730px] forced heights from component; sizing via CSS
fixedDuringPass.outcomesImageAlign: Removed lg:self-start that broke grid stretch parity

intentionalDeltas.images: Pillar stock images vs McShannock Sanity CDN photography
intentionalDeltas.copy: ThinqAsset fund-platform rationale/outcomes vs UX design copy
